summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: NumberPlane with 80 YELLOW correlated samples (cov = [[3, 1.8], [1.8, 1.3]]). BLUE PC_1 (largest eigenvalue direction) + RED PC_2 axes shown. ValueTracker s_tr morphs each point onto the PC_1 line via always_redraw scatter interpolation. Live λ_1, λ_2, variance-retained fraction.
